variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A row is present. Selected the main overhead buckets above operating profit. Did not separately add Other R&D Expenses because it appears to be embedded within Other operating expenses, avoiding double counting inside XSGA.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses

Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Prioritized the above-EBIT dedicated R&D line Other R&D Expenses. Included R&D Expenses as fallback priority because labels may vary over time. XSGA already includes Other operating expenses, which appears to embed Other R&D Expenses; this XRD mapping allows later subtraction via XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD.
